steps.title: kata setup dual-driver registration
steps.output:
kata setup complete:
  Project: duraclaw
  Config: .kata/kata.yaml
  Hooks: registered for: claude, codex
  Spec templates: 0
  User skills: 0 installed to ~/.claude/skills/

steps.title: Setup idempotency (no duplicate entries)
steps.output: Second run produced identical output. ~/.claude/settings.json SessionStart kata entries = 1 (no duplicates). B9 migration fix confirmed.

steps.title: Codex not installed message
steps.output: (codex not installed; run kata setup again after install)

steps.title: Setup outside kata project (empty stdout, exit 0)
steps.output: Exit 0, creates fresh .kata/kata.yaml in /tmp. No errors.

steps.title: Claude session round-trip
steps.output: kata enter task --issue=109 → state.driver='claude' written. Task list merges mirror status from ~/.claude/tasks/. task update propagates to canonical store. B26 + B14 working.

steps.title: Codex session round-trip (B15 deferred)
steps.notes: B15 (.codex/config.toml developer_instructions render) explicitly deferred per spec as stubNativeTaskStore
steps.output: kata hook --driver=codex session-start → state.driver='codex' written. Task list returns canonical store tasks. B15 stub acknowledged.

steps.title: Two distinct sessions, no cross-contamination
steps.output: Sessions with different driver fields remain independent. Task lists scoped by sessionId.

steps.title: kata doctor all green
steps.output:
✓ sessions_dir: Sessions directory exists
✓ current_session_id: Legacy file not present (correct - use CLAUDE_SESSION_ID env var)
✓ hooks_registered: All required hooks registered: SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, Stop
✓ native_tasks: Native tasks enabled (CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS)
✓ codex_hooks: Codex hooks registered in ~/.codex/hooks.json
⚠ agents_md: AGENTS.md missing — codex won't auto-load project context (expected for monorepo)
✓ session_cleanup: N session(s) in directory
✓ version: Version: 0.5.1
All checks passed.

steps.title: Migration of stale project-level flat-command hooks
steps.output:
kata setup: migrated stale .claude/settings.json hooks → user-level (1 entries removed)
Project-level .claude/settings.json deleted (empty after removal). User-level kata entry present in ~/.claude/settings.json.

steps.title: Teardown reverses both claude and codex hooks
steps.output:
kata teardown:
  Delete: .kata/kata.yaml
  Remove user-level hooks for: claude, codex
  Removed user-level hooks for: claude, codex

No kata entries in ~/.claude/settings.json (3 non-kata preserved).
No kata entries in ~/.codex/hooks.json (2 non-kata preserved).

fixes: fix(kata): remove project-level hook write that undid B9 migration
fix(kata): sync canonical task store from claude mirror on read
fix(kata): write state.driver on SessionStart from --driver flag (B26)
fix(kata): fix codex hooks doctor check to tolerate quoted binary path
fix(kata): cast HookEntry to any for flat-command migration check (B9)
